text:
Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd., a prominent Worldwide Olympic and Paralympic Partner, has announced the distribution of the unique Olympic Edition Galaxy Z Flip6 smartphones to athletes attending the Paris 2024 Games.

This edition marks a significant milestone as the first-ever Olympic Edition incorporating Galaxy AI, enhancing the athletes’ experience throughout the event.

The custom-designed Galaxy Z Flip6 devices are tailored exclusively for the 17,000 athletes participating in the Olympic and Paralympic Games worldwide. Samsung’s initiative aims to elevate the athletes’ Games-time journey from arriving in Paris.

As part of this global gesture, Team Ghana’s Harry Stacey was among the athletes who received the specially crafted smartphone, exemplifying Samsung’s commitment to supporting athletes and enhancing their experiences at the prestigious sporting event.

Samsung’s contribution underscores its dedication to innovation and enhancing connectivity, aligning with the spirit of global sportsmanship celebrated at the Olympic and Paralympic Games.

The Olympic Edition Galaxy Z Flip6 introduces advanced Galaxy AI features, further integrating technology to support athletes during their Paris 2024 campaign.
